expectations.text: Explains that the file scope is ambiguous.
expectations.evidence: Unstaged changes span multiple top-level directories (src, docs). Auto-selection requires single file or one top-level directory; user confirmation required.

expectations.text: Asks the user which files to commit next.
expectations.evidence: Ask which files to include or stage desired changes. Suggested choices: ['src/report/api.py', 'docs/report-api.md'].

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
